name: Vertex Energy, Inc.
description: Vertex Energy, Inc. is a Houston-based energy transition company that specializes in the production of high-quality refined products. The company focuses on the processing of alternative feedstocks and is recognized as one of the largest processors of used motor oil in the United States. Vertex Energy operates facilities across Texas and Louisiana, dedicated to producing both renewable and conventional fuels. By leveraging its refining capabilities, the company aims to support the transition toward more sustainable energy solutions while maintaining a robust portfolio of refined petroleum products for various industrial and commercial applications.
